name: Cherry Hill Mortgage Investment Corp
summary: Cherry Hill Mortgage Investment Corporation is a Maryland-incorporated REIT that invests in residential mortgage assets, primarily Agency RMBS (residential mortgage-backed securities issued or guaranteed by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, or Ginnie Mae), Servicing Related Assets (including MSRs and Excess MSRs), and non-Agency RMBS. The company operates through Cherry Hill Operating Partnership, LP, a Delaware limited partnership, and maintains REIT qualification under the Internal Revenue Code.

products.name: Agency RMBS
products.description: Residential mortgage-backed securities issued or guaranteed by a U.S. Government agency or GSE such as Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, or Ginnie Mae.

products.name: Servicing Related Assets
products.description: Includes MSRs and Excess MSRs, providing the right to service mortgage loans in exchange for a portion of interest payments.

products.name: Non-Agency RMBS
products.description: CMOs not issued or guaranteed by an Agency, including investment grade and non-investment grade classes.

products.name: TBA Securities
products.description: Forward-settling Agency RMBS where the specific pool is to-be-announced prior to settlement date.

partnerships.description: Issues or guarantees Agency RMBS in which CHMI invests.
Issues or guarantees Agency RMBS in which CHMI invests.
U.S. Government agency that issues or guarantees Agency RMBS in which CHMI invests.
